notes: 2026-03-23: Trump tweeted stop to Iran bombing, claiming 5-day deal window. Oil dropped 10% intraday, partial recovery. Relief rally but deal unconfirmed — Israel seeking regime change per prior statements. Energy boost reduced from 1.4→1.2 and cap lowered 0.4→0.35 while ceasefire window is open. If no deal by Sunday night futures open (~3/28), escalation risk returns and original boosts/caps should be restored. Watch Sunday night.
2026-03-23: Oil -10% on Iran ceasefire news. If sustained, reduces this tailwind. Reduced boosts 1.15→1.1 / 1.1→1.05 pending deal outcome.

event: SPY below 200 DMA — confirmed downtrend. Bottoming is a process. No new longs until 8 EMA + 21 EMA flatten and are reclaimed on a weekly close.

key_levels.SPY_8ema: overhead resistance — no close above in ~1 month
key_levels.SPY_21week: below for 4th straight week as of 3/23 — still a downtrend on weekly timeframe
key_levels.context: 3/23: SPY briefly broke above 200 DMA intraday on Iran ceasefire tweet (bear trap). Rejected and failed to close above. Classic textbook pattern — in a downtrend, relief rallies are 8 EMA rejections of key moving averages overhead. 21-week reclaim required on a weekly close before turning bullish. Do not chase this relief rally.
key_levels.SPY_last: ~658 (intraday 200 DMA breach, rejected — net close still below)

notes: Updated 2026-03-23: Iran ceasefire relief rally gave intraday 200 DMA breach but failed to close above it. Bulltard: 'today is nothing meaningful' — still below 21-week for 4th week. size_multiplier_adjust held at -0.25. If Iran deal confirmed and SPY reclaims 200 DMA on a daily close, consider reducing penalty to -0.10.

event: Iran-US ceasefire watch window (5 days from 3/23). High binary risk: deal = relief rally continuation; no deal = sharp risk-off on Sunday night futures.
notes: Trump announced 5-day window to negotiate Iran deal (3/23). Reduce position sizing slightly given binary outcome risk into weekend. If deal confirmed before 3/28, deactivate this event and update iran-israel-war-2026. If deal fails, reactivate full Energy boosts and war-risk dampeners.
